Setting
Max. number of iterations3000
Stop criterion10⁻⁷
Use Lohmoeller settings?No
Initial weights1.0
Weighting schemePath
Type of resultsStandardized
Vary copula by binary categoriesyes

Setting
ComplexityMost important (faster)
Save results per sampleNo
Confidence interval methodPercentile bootstrap
Parallel processingYes
Significance level0.05
Test typeTwo tailed
Samples5000
SeedFixed seed

Setting
